subcodes.first_line: In this day the Divine Book, with eloquent and lucid tongue, calleth unto all and summoneth them to the Most Exalted Horizon. Blessed be [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز کتاب الهی بلسان فصیح بلیغ کل را ندا مینماید و بافق اعلی دعوت میفرماید طوبی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @proclamation to the people of the world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
